_readme: Valid and invalid JSON request bodies for POST /api/payments. Read this before designing your PaymentRequest DTO. The _expectedStatus and _expectedViolations fields show exactly what your API must return for each request.

normalProcessed._description: Standard GBP payment between two ACTIVE accounts. Expect 202 Accepted. PaymentOutcome published to payments.processed with status PROCESSED. Row inserted in payment_outcomes. Use for Judge Scenario 1.

heldPayment._description: Amount exceeds £250,000. Expect 202 from ingestor. PaymentOutcome on payments.processed with status HELD. payment_outcomes row with status HELD. Use for Judge Scenario 5.

rejectedSameAccount._description: debitAccountId == creditAccountId. Expect 202 from ingestor (structurally valid). Processor routes to payments.dlq with status REJECTED. payment_outcomes row with status REJECTED. Use for Judge Scenario 6.

minimumFields._description: Valid payment with no optional reference field. Expect 202. The reference field is optional — its absence must NOT cause a 400.

eurPayment._description: EUR payment. Currency must accept any 3-character ISO code.

accountNotFound_debit._description: debitAccountId does not exist in the accounts table. Expect 404. Use for Judge Scenario 2. Do NOT use sample-invalid-account.json — that file is specifically for this scenario.

accountSuspended._description: debitAccountId 60-83-71/78900001 has status SUSPENDED in accounts.json. Expect 422 with error: Account is suspended: 60-83-71/78900001.

multipleViolations_scenario3._description: Three simultaneous Bean Validation failures: no currency, negative amount, future timestamp. This is the exact payload for Judge Scenario 3. Expect HTTP 400 with ALL THREE violations in a single response.

_expectedViolations.message: Currency must be a 3-character ISO code
Timestamp must not be in the future

duplicatePaymentId_scenario4._description: Same paymentId as validRequests.normalProcessed. Submit the normal request first, then submit this. Expect HTTP 409 on the second submission. The violations array must be empty. Use for Judge Scenario 4.
duplicatePaymentId_scenario4._expectedError: Duplicate payment ID — request already accepted
duplicatePaymentId_scenario4._note: Uses the same paymentId as validRequests.normalProcessed: 3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6

currencyTooLong._description: Currency is 4 characters. Violates @Size(min=3, max=3). Expect 400.

_expectedViolations.message: Currency must be a 3-character ISO code

referenceTooLong.reference: THIS REFERENCE EXCEEDS THE MAXIMUM ALLOWED LENGTH OF THIRTY-FIVE CHARACTERS
